Name: UsageExample
Description: Provide relevant illustrations of the use of the weights described produced in the weighting process.

Name: UsageRestrictions
Description: Note specific rules or restrictions for use.

Name: UsageRecommendations
Description: Recommend best practices for the use of the weights described produced in the weighting process.

Name: CommandCode
Description: Use CommandCode content to describe and/or specify code for using weights. Allows specification of input variables using parameters and binding as well description, code snippets or a link to external code.
